description: Assertions and diagnostic artifacts for PTY runs, including raw ANSI, cleaned text, final screen capture, metadata, input, and assertion reports.

userStories.title: Implement cleaned output and assertion engine
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want expected and forbidden text assertions against cleaned terminal output so that PTY scenarios have stable pass/fail checks.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate cleaned terminal text from raw PTY output while preserving the raw output separately
Evaluate expect patterns against cleaned text and fail when any expected pattern is missing
Evaluate reject patterns against cleaned text and fail when any forbidden pattern appears
Assertion failures include the missing or forbidden pattern in diagnostics
Unit tests cover ANSI cleanup, expected matches, missing expected text, and forbidden text
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write required artifact files
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want failed PTY runs to preserve raw output, cleaned output, metadata, input, screen, and assertion details so that failures are debuggable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create an artifact directory for each failed PTY run and for successful runs when configured
Write metadata.json, input.json, assertions.json, raw.ansi.log, clean.txt, and screen.txt or best-effort final capture
metadata.json records command, cwd/workdir, backend, timings, exit code, timeout status, provider mode, and artifact schema version
input.json records expanded input steps and timing
assertions.json records expected/rejected patterns and pass/fail details
Tests verify all required files exist after a forced failed run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Print actionable failure diagnostics
userStories.description: As an implementation agent, I want the CLI to print artifact paths and concise failure reasons so that I can report evidence in progress notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Failed PTY runs print the artifact directory path
Failure output names the stop reason or assertion that failed
Timeout failures distinguish wall-clock timeout from idle timeout
Artifact metadata redacts known secret-like environment values
Focused CLI failure-output tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add best-effort final screen capture
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a final screen artifact so that I can quickly see what the user likely saw at failure time.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate screen.txt from a terminal parser, tmux capture, or cleaned-output tail depending on available backend support
screen.txt generation failure does not discard raw.ansi.log or clean.txt
metadata.json records the screen capture method
Tests cover the cleaned-tail fallback path
Typecheck passes
